checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export the live session state to disk via `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export`, which now prefers `window.__JONES_FASTLANE_SESSION__` and falls back to `localStorage.jones_fastlane_save` only when no live bridge is present. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Resume Persona A from the authoritative Week 9 checkpoint. Player starts Week 10 at ₡380 / Hunger 80% / Sanity 45 with TRAUMA_REBOOT active. Objective: Survival. Since hunger is at 80% (exhaustion protocol limit for trauma), Player MUST consume food this turn or face game over (energy drain failure). Travel to Sustenance Hub, buy Real-Meat Burger x2 (if possible) or whatever food is available. Credits ₡380 is enough for food.

last_run.summary: Persona A's named browser session reopened on onboarding despite the startup continuity artifact claiming `live_continuity`, so the slice recovered by importing the authoritative Week 7 checkpoint. From the restored Week 7 summary anchor at `₡286 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 35 / Trauma Reboot 312h`, the live Week 8 build returned direct manual control, did not reproduce the old one-choice opener, and still supported the deterministic `Sanitation-T3` plus `Work Shift x3` route under `TRAUMA_REBOOT`. The authoritative Week 8 summary closed at `₡458 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 60% / Sanity 25` with `TRAUMA_REBOOT (266h)`, and the exported checkpoint correctly reported `browser_state_source: live_session`.
